file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: People who have diabetes have a higher chance of developing many health problems, including

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: heart disease.

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: This video will show you how heart disease can develop, how it affects your health, and

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: what you can do to help reduce your risk of heart disease.

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: If you have diabetes, it means your blood glucose or blood sugar is elevated.

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: Over time, high blood sugar can damage the blood vessels of your heart and other organs,

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: leading to other health problems.

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: This means the longer you have diabetes, the greater your risk for heart disease.

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: There are different types of heart disease, including coronary heart disease, cardiomyopathy,

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: arrhythmias, and heart failure.

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: Coronary heart disease is a build-up of a cholesterol-filled substance called plaque inside the blood

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: vessels of your heart.

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: The build-up of plaque in coronary heart disease can increase your risk of having a heart

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: attack.

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: cardiomyopathy refers to diseases of your heart muscle.

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: Cardiomyopathy may lead to abnormal heartbeats called arrhythmias.

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: Cardiomyopathy may also lead to heart failure.

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: This means your weakened heart can't pump enough blood to meet your body's needs.

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: Even both diabetes and heart disease can affect you in many ways.

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: You will have a higher risk for other serious health problems such as a heart attack, stroke,

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: and even death.

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: It may be harder for you to go about your daily activities.

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: You may need help taking care of yourself.

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: You may also need to take more medications.

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: Living with these conditions may cause depression.

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: The good news is that there are things you can do to help lower your risk for heart disease.

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: For example, you may need to make changes to your lifestyle.

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: If you smoke, get the help you need to quit.

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: Both smoking and diabetes can narrow your blood vessels which can increase your chance of

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: developing heart disease or stroke.

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: Maintain or get to a healthy weight.

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: Follow a healthy eating plan and get regular physical activity.

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: Check with your healthcare provider about the right amount of physical activity for you.

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: Make sure you work with your healthcare provider to control your blood sugar, cholesterol,

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: and blood pressure.

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: This includes taking all medications prescribed by your healthcare provider, including insulin

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: and pills to help lower blood sugar, blood pressure, and cholesterol.

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: Following the treatment plan you and your healthcare provider discussed will help you feel

file: ANH18208_Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease.mp4
title: ANH18208 Diabetes and Your Risk of Heart Disease
text_en: better and reduce your risk of getting heart disease.
